name: roldao-method
description: Framework agentic em PT-BR. 15 agentes, 26 hooks bloqueadores em Node puro + 2 soft warnings + 5 lifecycle + 1 utilitário (_lib.js) = 34 hooks total, 26 workflows, 31 skills BR (13 core + 18 em addons; CNPJ alfanumérico 2026, chave de acesso NF-e, Reforma Tributária 2026-2033, Pix, LGPD, fiscal, eSocial, CFM telemedicina, CNS/SUS), 7 addons especializados (6 stable + healthtech-br beta), 9 checklists. 46 regras inegociáveis (INV/SEC/TST/LGPD/FISCAL/PIX/INV-AGENT). Spec-driven com adapters pra Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Roo, Aider, Continue, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI.

scripts.test: npm run validar && npm run validar:ids && npm run validar:cobertura-hooks && npm run lint:self-masking && npm run test:tools && npm run test:claude-md-sync && npm run test:dogfood-sync && npm run test:lib-contract && npm run test:install-lib && npm run test:install && npm run test:hooks-node-only && npm run test:auditors-pass && npm run test:skills && npm run test:addons && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:agents-commands-statusline
